# Lunar Libations: Pouring Out Praise
## Scripture
"I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonders." - Psalm 9:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, the phases of the moon remind us of the ebbs and flows of our faith journey. Just as the moon waxes and wanes, our experiences of God's presence can vary. Yet, in every phase, we are called to pour out praise to our Creator. The moon's consistent cycles demonstrate God's faithfulness, inspiring us to respond with consistent worship. As we reflect on the moon's phases, we are reminded that our faith is not static, but dynamic, with times of growth and refinement. Just as the moon's light shines brightest when it is full, our lives can radiate God's glory when we are fully surrendered to Him.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the moon's phases, we are reminded of the ebbs and flows of our faith journey. Help us to pour out praise to You in every season, trusting in Your faithfulness and sovereignty. May our lives shine brightly with Your glory, reflecting Your love and wonder to a world in need. As we worship You, may our hearts be filled with joy and our spirits be lifted with wonder, inspiring us to tell of all Your wonders. Amen.
